name: rust_framework_v1
description: Rust ecosystem adapter for idiomatic Rust code generation, error handling, and async patterns

entries.notes: Real Rust code examples: thiserror patterns, async traits, ownership with Arc/RwLock, builder patterns, resource pools
Anti-patterns: unwrap() abuse, blocking in async, panic in libraries, unnecessary cloning, unsafe misuse, incorrect Send/Sync

provenance.review_notes: Initial Rust framework dataset for Layer 3 adapters
